form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation sixth of 12 at this track February 1 over 1300m, 6 len behind Clutch Runner with 54.5kg at $2.40. On debut ran last of 12 at this track November 28 over 1200m, 23 len behind Boryeongui Sinyong with 54kg at $3.90. Expect a forward showing.

form.formComment: Four-year-old filly making debut by Flashback out of Coconut Shrimp. Well placed to make a bright start.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months ran on from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track on March 13 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Lightning Force carrying 56.5kg at $7.60. Previously second-up made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 10 at this track on August 10 over 1200m, 13 len behind Encore with 55.5kg at $15.70. Fitter again and a winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping. Laid out throughout.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 6th of 10 at this track on March 20 over 1600m, 13 len behind Fantastic Boss carrying 52kg at $27.20. Previously second-up 10th of 12 at this track on October 17 over 1300m, slow going 16 len behind World Dancer Cat with 55kg at $120.90. Needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping. From the 1000m to the 600m, got its head up, laid out.
Jumped outward, bumping Flash Park and Happy Siseon.

form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Finished off last preparation raced on the pace when 3rd of 11 at this track on September 5 over 1200m, 4 len behind Wonder Moccasin carrying 57kg at $3.70. When resuming last campaign 4th of 12 at this track on March 7 2025 over 1200m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Seogwi Lady with 56kg at $21. Expected to run well.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 30-day let-up. Last start 6th of 12 at this track on March 13 over 1200m, 6 len behind Lightning Force with 54.5kg at $57.60. The run before that 7th of 12 at this track on February 15 over 1300m, 11 len behind Rush Wild with 54kg at $38.40. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped by Powerful Devil at the start.
Slow to begin. Passing the 400m, shifted out for a clear run.
